author: anon-59ff128d
content: Extracted shared test helpers into `tests/common/mod.rs`. Removed duplicate `setup_test`, `json_path`, `setup_single_file`, and `setup_multi_file` from 10 test files. Left `git_init` in `gitignore_test.rs` (only used there) and `json_request` in `cli_json_test.rs` (unique helper). Also unified `setup_json_test` in `cli_json_test.rs` into the shared `common::setup_test`. All 148 tests pass with no warnings.
